title: elaeoselinum asclepium
intro: Elaeoselinum asclepium, also known as Wild Angelica or Angelica, is a perennial plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been found to exhibit antioxidant and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Elaeoselinum asclepium include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Elaeoselinum asclepium include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
